titleStmt.title: SII 11.41: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 41. (B.K. No. 21 of 1926-27). NĀGĀVI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE TEMPLE OF NĀGĀRJUNA.

summary.p: The record which is badly damaged belongs to the time of Nityavarshadēva alias Koṭṭigadēva. It mentions his Gaṅga subordinate Satyavākya-Permānaḍigaḷ (i.e., Mārasiṁha II) as governing the Gaṅgavāḍi Ninety-six Thousand, Purigeṟe Three Hundred, Beḷvola Three Hundred, Kisukāḍu Seventy and Bāgaḍe Seventy. A subordinate of his by name Bōḻuga is described as the crest-jewel of the Pāpakalla-kula. The portion describing his exploits is completely worn out. But from what remains of it, it appears that he wrested from the Pāṇḍya(king) his golden umbrella and banner. The record registers a gift of land, made by Bōḻuga, on the occasion of the lunar eclipse which occurred on Friday, Mṛigaśira-nakshatra, Mārgaśira, puṇṇame of the year Śukla corresponding to Śaka 891 (= 26th November A.D. 969) for imparting education and for maintaining a feeding-house (satra) in the temple of Rāmēśvara at Nāgāvi. The inscription was composed by Sāmiyaṇṇa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti . nityavarṣadēva śrī pṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvara paramabha
ṭṭārakaṁ śrīmat koṭṭigadēva . kandaṁ . jaḷadhicara sakaḷakēḷī viḷāsa daduttaraṅga
sīkaramāḷāluḷitapravāḷa muktāphaḷani dra mudritōrvvī taḷaṁ
Antenisida sakaḷavasundharā syandanamanēkacchatracchāyeyo ḷuttarōttarābhi
vṛddhiyi nāḷuttuṁ . kandaṁ . vanata padadvayama
nūditavacanōtvāvana caritaṁ raṭṭatiḷakaṁ śrī mānyakhēṭadoḷnelasirddaṁ . Ire ta
tpādapadmōpajīvi satyavākyakoṁṅguṇi varmma dharmma mahārājādhirājaṁ kuvaḷāḷapu
ravarēśvaraṁ nandagirinātha śrī matpermmānaḍiga ḷgaṅgavāḍi toṁbhattaṟusāsiramu
maṁ purigeṟe mūnūṟumaṁ beḷvola mūnūṟumaṁ kisukāḍeḻpattumaṁ bāgaḍeḻpa
ttumaṁ nirākuḷamāḷuttire . kandaṁ . svasti samasta virōdhibaḷāstamitaṁ
dantavraja vinyastayaśaṁ sale negaḷda niḷāstutyaṁ pāpakallakula (kula)tilakaṁ
Ādaṟida virōdhiya taḷtiṟidarppaḍe pogaḻigo
jālmaldu dhātrige . Ātammathitārāti
vrātaṁ sakaḷārṇnavāvṛtakṣētradoḷ khyātaṁ tatsuta nupamātītabaḷaṁ koṟagaṁ
nya vā vikramaṁ tadātmajana
madaprākaṭaya bōḻuga neṁbōṁ . bīyādabi
yyadoḷe ḷeyōṁ niḷeyō
ḷajēyabaḷaṁ
mmigilkulada baladavala dodavinoḷ dhavaḷatara kīrttibhu
vanadoḷ bōḻugana . svasti samasta kuṁbhi kuṁbhasthaḷa saṁbhēdana pra
caṇḍamaṇḍaḷāgra ṇḍa daṇḍitārātimaṇḍaḷa pāpakallakulatilakaṁ
ḷḷupinātha mūḍa dēśarakṣakaṁ pāṇḍyāṁtagrihīta suvarṇnachatradhva
javirājamānaṁ kaliyugabhīmaṁ śrīmat bōḻagadiṁtaltai . kandaṁ . baṟida
ltu meccuśaucaṁ kiṟidaltāvarajagaṇḍu koṇḍattisakaṁ pau masuvaṟi
yaltenisidudu nijaguṇaṁ bōḻugana . Initanenipa bō saraluṁ va
nadhiyājñeyundina karanandana nācanana taneyaṁ bō rumappā
dantappanu mai [. I]ntendu sakaḷamahītaḷa guṇaga ṟumaṁ nyā
yōpārjjita māḷdarasugeyyuttu sukhadoḷire . kanda nuḍi himā
caḷabhūtādipahasanaśāradōjjvaḷa taccandrātapa digaṅganāsaṁgīta yaśōrōci
rāja nanupamatējaṁ . vṛttaṁ . dhuradoḷtaḷtiṟidondagurbbinaḷavaṁ māṟāntavaṁ kaṇḍu maiyga
yalkuppuya dōnemaltu bhayadindā poḻdu ṁcisaṅgaramaṁ nā rādendo
ḍe hitānītakke pullayki tuṁṭara muṁbarppava nisarvva ḻsaṁgrāmakau
ntēyanaṁ . kandaṁ . bhaṁgi yoḷarāti baḷacaturaṅgava mullasita niśitavaradhārā
saṅgamajaladoḷ muḷugisuvaṅgaṁ koṭṭiganudagranugrājigaḷoḷ . mattaṁ . kali
tanadurkke jāvanade cennike rūpinoḷolpe ḷdu mārvvaledadaṭirdda vīryyaviradā
yadoṟindu manakke saṁkeyantolagisidaṁ yante be
nnoḷabalavina mudedāntiṟeyalkaṇnana rā yka bhīmanuḷidāsatandaṁ rājanananni
yumaṁ gajarājana śarataleyu rājana nuḍirājana kāntiyu makhiḷa mahī
marmmagaḷigoḷipuda yamē . Intenisi pogaḻtigaṁ negaḻtiga māgaramāgiḻdu svasti sa
ka bhūpāḷa kāḷākrānta saṁvatsara śataṅgaḷeṇṭunūṟa toṁbhattondaneya suklasaṁvatsa
rada mārggaśirada puṇnameyu sukravāramuṁ mṛgaśira nakṣatramuṁ sōmagrahaṇa
dandu rāvayyaṁ bōḻagaverasi candrakuḷādyuvatīja
na maneyda parbbidaveresu dahanaṁ guṇagaṇa niḷaya
r . Ā yatigaḷa śiṣyarnnagaḻdāyati citanidhigaṁ yamaniyama svādhyāya nira
tarssamarttharamāyarccu titaḷa matigaḷ . Antenisi tapōmahimātya
ntarssale negaḻdāyati śiṣyarḷḷākuḷidēvardduritāṁtakara vyaktalingadēvarddai
var . A munipara pādaprakṣāḷanaṁ geydu nāgavāviya rāmēśvarada satrakkaṁ vidyādā
nakkamāgi rājamānaṁ sarvvabādhaparihāraṁ koṭṭa keymattarirppattaydu tōṇṭavondu ṭu
satradoḷnālvarttapōdhanara khaṇḍasphuṭitanavakarmma prōnaya śarbba
yyasu dānaṁ kādoṅgaṁ vāra
ṇāsi kurukṣētra prayāgegaṁge gaṁgāsāgara śrīparvvatameṁba śivatīrtthasthānaṅgaḷoḷsā
kaṁgeydu kavilekayā kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ pañcaratnaṅgaḷoḷkaṭṭisi mahāritvijagaḷgubhayamukhigoṭṭa
phaḷa Ivaṁ kiḍisidōnuṁ kiḍisuvarendoḍe biṭṭōnuṁ munne pēḻda tīrtthasthānaṅgaḷanitu kavileyu ma
naḻidu narakaṁbokka pañcamahāpātakarakkuṁ . bahubhirvvasudhā bhuktā rājabhissagarādibhiḥ .
yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasyatasya tadā phaḷaṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vāyōharēti vasu
ndharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ . munnīrbbaḷasire dharaṇiyoḷi
nnuṁ mādhuryyasukaracāturyyaguṇaprōnnatarillene sāsanamannide celvāge sāmiyaṇnaṁ
baredōṁ ©
Digital edition of SII 11.41 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
